title: Screen Size and Display Issues
description: Fix resolution, screen size, and UI scaling issues on monitors.

steps.instruction: Right-click on your Desktop and select 'Display settings'.
Scroll down to 'Scale and layout'. Ensure the 'Scale' dropdown is set to the (Recommended) percentage (usually 100% or 125%).
Ensure the 'Display resolution' dropdown is set to the (Recommended) option for your monitor.
If using an external monitor, disconnect and reconnect the HDMI/DisplayPort cable.
Restart your computer. If the screen is still too stretched or blurry, your graphics driver may need updating (raise a ticket for IT).
